case_title: MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ALI MUSTAFA MOSAMMEL

docket_entries.description: AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR.
